description: Existing or available in large quantities; plentiful beyond need. 'Lorua' names the quality of overflow—harvests that exceed need, generosity that keeps giving, life that produces more than it consumes.
sound_symbolism: The word overflows with plenty. 'Lo' begins laden, already holding much. Then 'ru' rolls with more arriving, overflow building. Finally 'a' opens to expansion, abundance spreading.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'lorua lurekoi' (abundant fruit). Stronger than 'pheno' (full)—abundance implies excess beyond capacity, plenty to share.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Abundance thinking replaces scarcity—nature produces abundantly when systems are healthy, and human systems can too.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Abundant harvests were celebrated—the overflow that allowed feasting, sharing, and provision for hard times.
